---
name: "🚗 Compatibility report"
about: "Tried it on your car? Tell us what worked — this is the most useful report right now."
title: "[compat] <car model> / <region> — works? "
labels: ["compatibility"]
---

**Car model & year:** (e.g. Jaecoo J5 EV 2025)
**Region / country:** (e.g. Indonesia, region `sea`)
**App:** CarLinko version, if you know it

## What worked
- [ ] Login (email + password)
- [ ] Auto-detect vehicle (`setup.py` / login page)
- [ ] Battery %
- [ ] Range
- [ ] Odometer
- [ ] 12V voltage
- [ ] Charging sessions
- [ ] Trip planner / SPKLU map

## What was wrong or missing
Describe anything that showed the wrong value or didn't appear. If a number was off, what did the
**car's own dashboard** say vs the app?

> ⚠️ Do **not** paste your token, password, VIN or plate. Redact screenshots.
